# misp_sharing_group (Resource)

A MISP sharing group. Defines which organisations and servers can see data tagged with the group. Org/server membership is managed by future dedicated resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "misp_sharing_group" "partners" {
  name          = "Partner Network"
  description   = "Shared with trusted partners"
  releasability = "Releasable to named partners only"
  active        = true
  local         = false
  roaming       = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Sharing group name.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the sharing group is active.
- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `local` (Boolean) Local-only: sharing group is not synchronised to other instances.
- `releasability` (String) Human-readable releasability statement (e.g. `For internal use only`).
- `roaming` (Boolean) Roaming: allows member organisations at any instance to receive the data.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric MISP identifier.
- `org_id` (String) Owning organisation id (defaults to the caller's org).
- `uuid` (String) Stable UUID assigned by MISP.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Import an existing MISP sharing group by its numeric id.
terraform import misp_sharing_group.partners 12
```
